# hostinger_reach_segments (Data Source)

Lists contact segments from the Hostinger Reach API.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `segments` (Attributes List) The list of contact segments. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--segments))

<a id="nestedatt--segments"></a>
### Nested Schema for `segments`

Read-Only:

- `created_at` (String) RFC3339 timestamp of when the segment was created.
- `name` (String) Name of the segment.
- `updated_at` (String) RFC3339 timestamp of when the segment was last updated.
- `uuid` (String) Unique identifier of the segment.
